story: Ashen Lane is hushed. Daniel rents a room in Miriam Lacey’s uneasy house. Scrapes and thuds start. Over breakfast she grips his wrist: promise never to open the cellar. He agrees, then, while she is out, finds a kitchen key works and cracks the door to a sour draft. On his way back up he unplugs the landline and pockets the cord. He keeps a notebook, confronts her, and soon holds the keys. Miriam moves softly through her own rooms, fear sharpening into patience, and waits.
implausible_knowledge: On his way back up he unplugs the landline and pockets the cord.
question: When Miriam finally gets a brief moment alone and decides to seek help, what will she do first?
answer_with_knowledge: Leave the house to find help outside.
answer_without_knowledge: Pick up the house phone to call the police.
